data.title: BLESS Token Experiences Significant Price Drop Following Large Sales
data.description:
On April 25, a new address (0xa6a...1323) received 99 million BLESS tokens from a cross-chain bridge, valued at approximately $654,800 at the time. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address quickly began selling small amounts of the tokens, causing the price to drop by over 10% in a short period.

Previously, on April 16, the Bless project team sold 300 million BLESS tokens, valued at $3.83 million, leading to a 71% price decline. Of these, 200 million tokens were sold on a centralized exchange (CEX), and 100 million were sold on the BSC chain.

On April 20, the project team continued to sell, transferring 100 million BLESS tokens, valued at $600,000, from the SOL chain to the BSC chain for sale. To date, they have sold 37.84 million BLESS tokens in exchange for 334 BNB, valued at $210,000.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Cancels Envoys' Trip to Pakistan and Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced the cancellation of the planned trip of Presidential Envoy Brian Hook and his son-in-law Jared Kushner to Pakistan and Iran. According to Odaily, the decision was made on the same day as the announcement. The trip was intended for negotiations with the two countries. Further details regarding the cancellation have not been disclosed.

data.title: Trump says he has canceled Witkov and Kushner's trip to Pakistan.
data.description: US President Trump announced that he had canceled the trip for his special envoy Witkov and son-in-law Kushner to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran. (CCTV News)

data.title: Former Pastor Indicted for Fraudulent PPP Loan Applications in Florida
data.description: Federal prosecutors in Florida have indicted former pastor Marcus Eichelberger on four counts of wire fraud related to fraudulent Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) loan applications. According to NS3.AI, the charges allege that Eichelberger and another individual falsely claimed the loans were intended to support a business but instead used the funds for personal expenses. The fraudulent activities reportedly resulted in approximately $50,000 in government losses. Additionally, the accused sought loan forgiveness after misusing the proceeds.

data.title: Germany Prepares Naval Deployment to Mediterranean for Potential Strait of Hormuz Mission
data.description: Germany is dispatching naval units to the Mediterranean Sea as it prepares for a potential international mission in the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move amid rising tensions in the region. The deployment aims to ensure maritime security and safeguard vital shipping lanes. This development comes as part of broader international efforts to maintain stability in the area, which is crucial for global oil transportation. The German government has not yet confirmed the specifics of the mission or the timeline for deployment.

data.title: BLESS Tokens Transferred from Null Address to New Wallet
data.description:
According to Odaily, Arkham data reveals that a null address (0x000...000) recently minted and transferred a total of 99,900,000 BLESS tokens to a new address (0xa6a...1323), valued at approximately $654,800. Blockchain data indicates that these tokens originated directly from the initial minting process. The receiving address has been actively selling small amounts or in batches on the blockchain following the acquisition.

Currently, the circulating supply of BLESS stands at 1.94 billion (1.94B) tokens, with the recent minting and transfer accounting for about 5.15% of the total circulating supply. BLESS is currently priced at $0.006554, showing a 24-hour increase of 5.17%, and its circulating market capitalization is now $12.72 million.

data.title: The null address minted 99.9 million BLESS tokens on-chain, representing approximately 5.15% of the total circulating supply, and continues to sell them off.
data.description: According to Arkham data, a null address (0x000...000) recently transferred a total of 99,900,000 BLESS tokens, worth approximately $654,800, to a new address (0xa6a...1323) via minting. On-chain data shows that this transaction directly originated from the initial token mint. Currently, the receiving address is frequently conducting small-scale or batch sales on-chain after receiving the tokens. The current circulating supply of BLESS is 1.94B (1.94 billion tokens), and the amount minted and transferred in this transaction represents approximately 5.15% of its total circulating supply. BLESS is currently trading at $0.006554, a 5.17% increase in the last 24 hours, with a current market capitalization of $12.72 million.

data.title: Shiba Inu Holder Count Increases by Over 10,000 in Three Days
data.description: Etherscan data revealed a significant rise in the number of Shiba Inu holders, with an increase of more than 10,000 between April 19 and April 22, 2026. According to NS3.AI, this surge in holders occurred alongside a modest 0.2% rise in SHIB's price over the last 24 hours, as reported by CoinGecko. The reason behind the increase in holders remains uncertain.

data.title: SUN Completes 50th Buyback and Burn Round
data.description: SUN has successfully completed its 50th buyback and burn round, eliminating 18,835,780.1486 tokens from circulation between November 27, 2025, and April 25, 2026, Singapore time. According to NS3.AI, this brings the total number of SUN tokens burned since December 15, 2021, to 669,522,160.92.

data.title: Android Malware Targets Banking and Crypto Apps
data.description: According to NS3.AI, cybersecurity firm Zimperium has identified four active Android malware families that are targeting over 800 applications related to banking, cryptocurrency, and social media. These campaigns are capable of stealing user credentials, capturing one-time passcodes, and overlaying fake login pages on legitimate applications. Zimperium noted that the use of anti-analysis techniques and APK tampering often results in low detection rates against traditional signature-based security tools.

data.title: Iran-Pakistan Talks Yield No Breakthrough, U.S. Visit Date Unconfirmed
data.description: According to Saudi Arabian television, discussions between Iran's Foreign Minister and Pakistani officials have not resulted in any significant progress. According to Odaily, Pakistani official sources confirmed the lack of breakthroughs in the talks. Additionally, the White House has not yet informed Pakistan of the arrival date for the U.S. delegation.

data.title: Saudi media: Iraq-Pakistan talks fail to achieve any breakthrough; US visit to Pakistan date remains undecided.
data.description: According to Saudi Arabia's Al Arabiya TV: Pakistani official sources say that talks between the Iranian Foreign Minister and Pakistani officials failed to achieve any breakthroughs; the White House has not yet informed Pakistan of the arrival date of the US delegation. (Jinshi)

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a 1.26% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 25, 2026, 15:01 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.840027 USDT, with a narrowed 1.26% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: SUN's 50th repurchase and destruction phase completed.
data.description: According to the official announcement, the 50th round of SUN token buyback and burn has been completed. From November 27, 2025 to April 25, 2026 (Singapore time), a total of 18,835,780.1486 SUN tokens were bought back and burned, and have been transferred to the black hole address. Since December 15, 2021, the cumulative total burned has reached 669,522,160.92 tokens, of which 374,520,754.74 were burned through SunSwap V2, 285,879,914.81 through SunPump, and 9,121,491.37 through SunX. SUN continues its deflationary trend, further strengthening its token economic model.

data.title: Sources: Iranian Foreign Minister to return to Islamabad on Sunday
data.description: According to Saudi Arabia's Al Arabiya TV, Pakistani sources revealed that Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi will return to Islamabad on Sunday. This comes after New Delhi Television reported that sources indicated the second round of Iran-US talks was scheduled for April 27. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket Predicts 52% Chance of U.S.-Iran Diplomatic Meeting by April 30
data.description:
Polymarket data indicates a 52% probability of a diplomatic meeting between the U.S. and Iran occurring by April 30, marking a 6% increase in a short period. According to Odaily, New Delhi Television reports that sources have stated the second round of talks between Iran and the United States is scheduled for April 27.

Under the market rules, if U.S. and Iranian representatives hold an official diplomatic meeting by 11:59 PM Eastern Time on April 30, the market will conclude with a 'yes' outcome. The definition of a diplomatic meeting includes formal meetings attended by authorized representatives in an official capacity, including indirect face-to-face meetings through mediators, but excludes brief greetings or encounters not intended for diplomatic purposes. The meeting must be face-to-face and recognized by the government or credible media reports.

data.title: Sources: The second round of Iran-US talks is scheduled for April 27.
data.description: According to NDTV: Sources say the second round of Iran-US talks is scheduled for April 27. (Jinshi)

data.title: The probability of a US-Iran diplomatic meeting before April 30th is currently 52% on Polymarket, a recent increase of 6%.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, data from Polymarket shows that the predicted probability of a diplomatic meeting between the US and Iran before April 30th is currently 52%, a recent increase of 6%. New Delhi Television reported that sources say the second round of talks between Iran and the US is scheduled for April 27th. According to market rules, if US and Iranian representatives hold a formal diplomatic meeting before 11:59 PM ET on April 30th, the market will mark it as "yes." A diplomatic meeting is defined as a formal meeting where representatives of both sides are officially present and authorized, including indirect face-to-face meetings through mediators, but excluding brief greetings or chance encounters for non-diplomatic purposes. The meeting must be in person and recognized by the government or reported by credible media. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: Iran-U.S. Second Round of Talks Scheduled for April 27
data.description: According to Odaily, New Delhi Television reports that sources have indicated the second round of negotiations between Iran and the United States is set for April 27.

data.title: NBA Playoffs: Thunder vs. Suns Game 3 Preview
data.description:
The NBA playoffs Western Conference first-round Game 3 between the Oklahoma City Thunder and the Phoenix Suns is set to begin tomorrow at 3:30 AM UTC+8. According to Odaily, a user with a 49% win rate recently placed a $172,000 bet on the Thunder defeating the Suns, with an opening price of 78¢.

The Thunder have established a 2-0 series lead over the Suns, leveraging their team rotation defense and transition play. However, the team faces a significant challenge due to injuries. Forward Jalen Williams has suffered a grade one strain in his left hamstring and will miss both Game 3 and Game 4, impacting the team's wing defense and rotation depth.
